label: 1508 CE
era_summary: Year 1508 (MDVIII) was a leap year starting on Saturday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1508: Pope, Spain, France, emperor, Mantua-Venice, 1508-10. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
